arts.ttl: Who is set to miss Real Madrid’s Copa del Rey clash against Real Sociedad tonight?
arts.sum: Real Madrid are set to take on Real Sociedad tonight at the Reale Arena in San Sebastián in the first leg of the Copa del Rey semi final. Whoever advances…

arts.ttl: Atletico Madrid outspend Real Madrid as transfer figures for last decade are revealed
arts.sum: Real Madrid have the image of the big-spending and all-conquering multi-national giant in football, but President Florentino Perez has more recently defined their transfer strategy by relative austerity. Limiting Los Blancos to just one galactico signing per summer, they only bring in experienced players as free agents these days too. That shift occurred after their […] The post Atletico Madrid outspend Real Madrid as transfer figures for last decade are revealed appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid without three key players for Copa del Rey semi-final
arts.sum: Carlo Ancelotti's Real Madrid are heading to San Sebastian to take on Real Sociedad in the first leg of their Copa del Rey semi-final.

arts.ttl: Kylian Mbappe hands Real Madrid Copa Del Rey blow after TOOTH removal rules star man out
arts.sum: The Frenchman was initially a part of the squad according to coach Carlo Ancelotti

arts.ttl: Antony free to face Real Madrid after appeal
arts.sum: Winger Antony will be available for Real Betis' La Liga match against Real Madrid on Saturday after winning an appeal against a red card.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid squad vs. Real Sociedad revealed as fresh Los Blancos injury blow is confirmed while key trio are left out
arts.sum: Real Madrid head coach Carlo Ancelotti leaves Kylian Mbappe, Thibaut Courtois and Federico Valverde out of his squad for Wednesday's Copa del Rey semi-final first leg against Real Sociedad, while Jesus Vallejo is injured.

arts.ttl: Mbappé out for Real Madrid after having tooth out
arts.sum: Kylian Mbappé has been left out of Real Madrid's squad for their game at Real Sociedad on Wednesday, after having a tooth removed earlier this week.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid lose Mbappé for this strange medical reason
arts.sum: Mbappé will not be in San Sebastián for the Copa del Rey game against Real Sociedad . He has been granted rest, meaning he will not face Real Sociedad .

arts.ttl: Real Madrid eye Branthwaite move - Wednesday's gossip
arts.sum: Real Madrid are considering a move for Jarrad Branthwaite, Napoli are prepared to make Rasmus Hojlund offer and Tino Livramento among Manchester City targets.

arts.ttl: ‘Be careful’: Ian Wright says Real Madrid would happily sign £27m Arsenal player tomorrow if they could
arts.sum: Arsenal are in a very strange situation at the moment. Barring a minor miracle, it looks like the Gunners won’t be winning the league title...
